label: Wide-shell 3BR / baths CLUSTERED with wing HALL node — 3BR extension of the 2BR wd side_split family: a 2x2 private wing on the west (master + br2 front, ensuite+common wet block + br3 rear) with a central hall node, LDK column on the east. Open-plan great_room + kitchen (gr style).

adjacencies.note: ensuite sits directly behind master (rear-west of the wing) — interior door on master's rear wall
clustered wet block — ensuite (west) and common (east) share one plumbing wall in the wing's rear row
master (front-west) and br2 (front-east of the wing) share the front row — wall only, no door
master doors east into the hall node
br2 doors south into the hall node
br3 (rear-east of the wing) doors south-west into the hall node
common bath's only door opens south into the hall — both standards and guests reach it via the hall
hall's east face is an open mouth into the great_room (codebase rule: hallway↔great_room is always open). 0.9 m minimum single-person mouth
great_room (front) + kitchen (rear) stack in the east LDK column (gr style)

soft_proximities.note: pull the wet block toward the kitchen column so the dirty-kitchen/service run stays on one rear bay
keep the shared bath beside the rear standard

lot_adjustment_profiles.name: compact_wd_side_split_baths_cl_hall_gr
lot_adjustment_profiles.rationale: The wing needs ~6.5-7.0 m of frontage (two bedroom columns) plus the LDK column — frontage, not area, binds first. Hall node floors at 1.0 m clear. When preferred relaxes, baths compress toward the hard min but the kitchen galley never drops below 1.8 m. If frontage < ~11.5 m, fall back to half_spine.

notes: 3BR wide catalog topology #2 — SIDE_SPLIT with 2x2 wing and clustered wet
block. Direct 3BR extension of 1s_2br_wd_side_split_bath_hall_gr (the wing
gains a second column; the single bath becomes an ensuite+common block).
Natural floor band ~90-104 m²; canonical test shell 12.0 x 8.0 m; needs
frontage >= ~11.5 m.
Layout intent (canonical, west = left):
Rear:   [ensuite | common | br3   | kitchen        ]
Middle: [(master)| HALL node     | (great cont.)  ]
Front:  [master  | br2           | great (entry)  ]
Program: the private wing is a 2x2 grid — front row [master | br2], rear row
[wet block | br3] — with a hall node carved at its center-east, mouthing east
into the great_room. Every bedroom door and the common bath door face the
hall node: best privacy of the wide family (no bedroom doors off the LDK).
The east column is the public LDK: great_room front (hosts entry), kitchen
rear.
Ventilation: master + br2 front wall, ensuite + br3 rear wall, common vents
via high window to the rear (behind the wet block) or mechanical per PD 1096.
Plumbing: single clustered stack (ensuite+common share the wet wall), softly
pulled toward the kitchen column so all wet services and the rear-setback
dirty kitchen land within one bay.
Carport: NCP base form; declare via brief. Mirror when
brief.carport_side='left'.
